candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but it is a total D&A row and not clearly attributable specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and services'. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocating overhead/SG&A/R&D D&A into COGS.
Separate depreciation line, but not labelled as cost of sales / materials / production / COGS. Insufficient evidence that it sits outside and belongs specifically to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization for the period
candidates.why: Another separate D&A line, but not labelled as COGS-related. Likely part of broader operating D&A detail rather than a COGS-specific add-on.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly R&D-related, so not a COGS D&A row.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Materials and services'. The excerpt shows no D&A row explicitly tied to COGS / cost of sales / materials. The visible D&A rows appear to be separate operating totals/details rather than COGS-specific components. To avoid double counting or misallocation, no COGS_DA row should be added separately.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line above operating profit, but it appears to be a company-wide operating D&A total rather than clearly an SG&A-only amount. Adding it to XSGA would risk including production/COGS-related D&A.
Separate depreciation detail line, but not labelled as SG&A/admin/marketing/overhead-specific. Less suitable than a bucket-specific row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization for the period
candidates.why: Another D&A detail row without SG&A-specific wording. Could overlap with other D&A lines and is not clearly attributable only to XSGA.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related amortization line above operating profit. Under the special R&D interaction rule, because the selected XRD row is elsewhere and not an above-operating-profit R&D line within the XSGA bucket, this explicit R&D amortization may need to be added separately to XSGA_DA.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined bucket of 'Selling, General', 'Employee benefits xpense', and 'Other operating expenses'. The generic D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not clearly SG&A-only, so they are excluded to avoid misallocating broader operating D&A. The explicit row 'Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses' is bucket-specific and fits the special-case guidance for R&D-related D&A.
